overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through an industrial district of Night City. The player character crosses a street toward an industrial complex, turns left at a Militech building with prominent neon signage, and proceeds along graffiti-covered sidewalks beneath overhead industrial structures. The environment features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with red and green neon lighting, wet reflective pavement, and dystopian urban architecture.

crosses the street and enters the industrial plaza area with yellow barriers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a crosswalk facing an industrial complex entrance marked by green neon signs. The camera moves forward across the street, passing yellow concrete barriers as it enters the plaza area. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in opposing directions across the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with corporate neon signage

events.description: turns left at the corner revealing the DTR and Militech building
moves into area dominated by red and blue neon signage from the Militech building

agents.ego_description: turning left at the street corner and proceeding along the sidewalk past the Militech building

entered.detail: large red and blue neon DTR sign atop the building
industrial building facade with prominent Militech corporate signage
illuminated advertisement billboard visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the corner, revealing a large building with prominent DTR and Militech neon signage in red and blue. The scene transitions from the industrial plaza to a city sidewalk with the corporate building dominating the left side. The lighting shifts to emphasize the vibrant neon signage against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with graffiti-covered walls and litter

events.description: enters covered walkway area with extensive graffiti on the right wall
passes a pedestrian wearing a red shirt with distinctive back graphics

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the graffiti-covered sidewalk, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing a red shirt with 'WOUNDED MACHINE' text on the back

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in extensive red and white graffiti tags
scattered papers and debris along the sidewalk edge
metal catwalks and pipes spanning across the street overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower, covered industrial walkway with a graffiti-covered wall on the right and trash scattered along the sidewalk. The camera moves forward beneath overhead metal structures, passing a pedestrian in a distinctive red shirt. Vehicle traffic is visible on the street to the left, and the lighting becomes more subdued under the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with overhead pipes and active traffic

events.description: several vehicles pass by on the street to the left
emerges from under the dense overhead structure into slightly more open area

agents.ego_description: continuing down the industrial corridor alongside moderate vehicle traffic

notable_agents.action: car driving down the street with headlights on

entered.detail: dense network of metal pipes and industrial infrastructure overhead
large industrial buildings with smokestacks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the industrial sidewalk with moderate vehicle traffic passing on the left. The camera moves beneath extensive overhead pipe structures that dominate the skyline. The graffiti wall falls behind as the scene opens slightly, revealing more distant industrial buildings and infrastructure ahead. The environment maintains the dystopian industrial aesthetic with artificial street lighting illuminating the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open industrial plaza into the claustrophobic, neon-lit corridors of a corporate district. It begins at a crosswalk facing an industrial complex marked by green neon, moving forward past yellow concrete barriers and sparse pedestrians. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts toward a corporate aesthetic dominated by vibrant red and blue Militech signage that glows against the night sky. The scene then narrows into a covered industrial walkway, where the lighting becomes subdued beneath overhead metal structures and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera proceeds along the wet pavement under a canopy of extensive pipe structures, moving past passing vehicle traffic as the view opens slightly toward distant industrial infrastructure.
